phases_executed: Phase 1: Schema migrations (DB Agent lane — applied by DB Agent)
Phase 2: CID compiler worker with cron
Phase 3: SID message construction worker with DB trigger (pg_notify) + cron fallback
Phase 4: MID delivery engine with sequence logic, gate integration, adapter calls, and cron

created.description: TypeScript types for lcs.cid table — LcsCidRow, LcsCidInsert
TypeScript types for lcs.sid_output table — LcsSidOutputRow, LcsSidOutputInsert
TypeScript types for lcs.mid_sequence_state table — LcsMidSequenceStateRow, LcsMidSequenceStateInsert
CID Compiler — Phase 2. signal_queue → lcs.cid. Mints communication_id, runs capacity + freshness gates, matches frame.
SID Worker — Phase 3. lcs.cid (COMPILED) → lcs.sid_output. Dual mode: LISTEN (pg_notify real-time) + batch (cron fallback). Resolves audience, constructs message content.
Patch migration: pg_notify trigger on lcs.cid for SID worker. Fires on COMPILED CID inserts.
MID Engine — Phase 4. lcs.sid_output (CONSTRUCTED) → lcs.mid_sequence_state + lcs.event. Runs gates, calls adapter, logs CET.
CID→SID→MID cron runner. Orchestrates three-phase pipeline in sequence.
SQL contract for lcs.cid table — schema, constraints, triggers, indexes, comments.
SQL contract for lcs.sid_output table — schema, constraints, triggers, indexes, comments.
SQL contract for lcs.mid_sequence_state table — schema, constraints, triggers, indexes, comments.

modified.description: Added 8 new enum types: CompilationStatus, ConstructionStatus, GateVerdict, ThrottleStatus, MidDeliveryStatus, CidCompilationRule, MidSequenceType, LifecyclePhase.
Added 5 new columns matching migration 005 ALTER: cid_compilation_rule, sid_template_id, mid_sequence_type, mid_delay_hours, mid_max_attempts.
Added barrel exports for cid, sid-output, mid-sequence-state type modules.
@deprecated notice added. Points to CID compiler, SID worker, MID engine as replacements.
@deprecated notice added. Points to cid-sid-mid-cron.ts as replacement.
Added 5 new CID/SID/MID pipeline columns with CHECK constraints and comments. Version bumped 2.2.0 → 2.3.0.
Applied column_registry_patch.yml: Section A (SH-LCS-PIPELINE sub-hub with 3 tables) + Section B (5 new frame_registry columns).
Bumped v2.2.0 → v2.3.0. Added CID/SID/MID pipeline tables + signal_queue to inventory, pipeline data flow diagram, ID minting contracts, updated mutability rules and relationships.
Added pipeline tables, CTB/doctrine tables, pipeline ERD navigation entries. Updated schema statistics.

created_by_db_agent.description: Full Type B documentation for SH-LCS-PIPELINE: column dictionaries for lcs.cid (14 cols), lcs.sid_output (14 cols), lcs.mid_sequence_state (14 cols), frame_registry ALTER columns, immutability enforcement, doctrine sections.
Mermaid ERD for SH-LCS-PIPELINE: 8 entities, 9 relationships, per DOCUMENTATION_ERD_DOCTRINE v1.0.0.

Type B documentation for ctb.table_registry, doctrine.doctrine_library, doctrine.doctrine_key, doctrine.doctrine_library_error. Includes current registry contents (20 entries), domain coverage, semantic search examples.

migrations_note: Migration 005 + 005a applied to Neon. Tables lcs.cid, lcs.sid_output, lcs.mid_sequence_state exist. frame_registry has 5 new columns. notify_sid_worker trigger active on lcs.cid.
column_registry_note: column_registry_patch.yml applied to column_registry.yml — SH-LCS-PIPELINE sub-hub added (Section A), 5 frame_registry columns added (Section B).
